title: Emails in activities board
excerpt:
anyone seen or worked out how to get an email item in the activities board when sending or receiving and email in emails and activities? 
my client heavily uses email and they are missing this activity from there KPIs

posts.author: LeeProv (Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
anyone seen or worked out how to get an email item in the activities board when sending or receiving and email in emails and activities?

my client heavily uses email and they are missing this activity from there KPIs

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lee,

I might need you to elaborate a little further if that’s okay?

Are you looking to integrate an activity (/item) into an email you’re sending in the E+A app? Any further details would be appreciated - thank you!

posts.author: n.fylakis (Nikolaos Fylakis)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love such a feature because it can be used within an automation.

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @LeeProv,

You can use the EasyMails app to send and track emails directly within your monday.com board. With EasyMails, you can send emails from an item, board, or through automations. It tracks activities such as sent, opened, and clicked, adding this information to the item, so you have everything in one place.
